goal: Add a side-effect-free readiness builder for cockpit patch permit issuance, requiring policy and issuer refs while keeping permit issuance, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, renderer changes, runtime, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not issue permits, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, change renderer files, enable cockpit actions, call AICOS, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Cockpit patch permit issuance can be classified as readiness without issuing a permit.
Policy and issuer refs are required for ready status.
assumptions: Actual permit issuance requires a later task lock.
dod: Ready, missing policy ref, and blocked evidence cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit issuance, server mutation, route mutation, renderer mutation, executable actions, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-087 bundled cockpit patch permit-prep evidence without issuing a permit.
